Class VaultConfiguration.VaultClientAuthenticationProviderConfiguration

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.cloud.config.server.config.VaultConfiguration.VaultClientAuthenticationProviderConfiguration
Enclosing class:
VaultConfiguration
@Configuration(proxyBeanMethods=false) @ConditionalOnClass(org.springframework.vault.core.VaultTemplate.class) public static class VaultConfiguration.VaultClientAuthenticationProviderConfiguration extends Object
Author:
Scott Frederick
